title: Belloa virescens

taxonomy: Belloa virescens is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. It is native to South America. The classification of Belloa virescens is further broken down into its botanical classification: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Asterids, Order: Asterales, Family: Asteraceae, Genus: Belloa, Species: B. virescens. Belloa virescens is a part of the Belloa genus, which is a group of flowering plants. The genus Belloa is closely related to other genera in the Asteraceae family.
